title: Brainrot Delight
description: An addon for Farmer's Delight that adds brainrot foods
body:
# Ok kids, here's your... SIGMA MEAL! SKIBIDI SLICERS!

![Mod image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MNdGP4dU/images/b16c738e17ae7714ac5ce8a9de1c9385eb4a41b0.png)

 **..Is what you would be saying if you decided to get Brainrot Delight.**

 **Brainrot Delight adds various brainrot food/drink items into the world of Farmer's Delight.**

 **You can finally have the iconic Sigma Meal experience in Minecraft!**

 **Basically, I was only asking if I could, instead of if I should.**

## Here's the content:

- **Rizzie Sprite**

  - Made by cooking. Served in the new Metal Bottle item.

  - When consumed, it will give you 5:00 of Static Charged.

  - Static Charged is a new effect that will smite whatever you attack while it is raining.

  ![Metal Bottle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f6e884875b9cfcde0a0f914d2e16b477be4cbef.png)

  ![Rizzie Sprite Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a519a33336ebec255d3fbd4642dbe256e736b0f8.png)

-----

- **Dr. Perky**

  - Made by cooking. Served in a Metal Bottle.

  - Perfect if you're fucked up in the crib.

  ![Dr Perky Cook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6ee8d1f24103294d937ad08d4e99467c58e351e.png)

-----

- **Moe Coin**

  - Made by cutting an Iron Block with a pickaxe on a Cutting Board.

  - Top 10 Moe moments from Family Guy!!

  ![Moe Coin Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fece1b7663160b4f744d14e0c9c181fd616cb77.png)

-----

- **Jeff Coin**

  - Made by cutting a Gold Block with a pickaxe on a Cutting Board.

  - The ultimate currency for all of your Jeff Realm needs. Peak coin.

  ![Jeff Coin Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25d4ef13b90bbb3f1380ec4f10651d6413d1df4e.png)

-----

- **Moss Ball**

  - A ball of moss, completely harmless.



  ![Moss Ball Cooking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8cb33cb20b157b64dd623ee92c68a817441f056.png)

-----

- **EVIL Moss Ball**

  - PURE EVIL. AVOID AT ALL COSTS.

  - (It withers you when eaten.)

  ![EVIL Moss Ball Cooking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1383e9f71df6a7d900ed0fd6fead7ad590ba77a.png)

-----

- **Potassium**

  - Found by trading with a Farmer Villager.



  ![POTASSIUM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87f91f7ed32f75e5cf1f3059e53174f9a1ae1c5c.png)

-----

- **Sussy Sauce**

  - Sussy Sauce is Tomato Sauce with cooked pork mixed into it.

  - Used to create various things.

  ![Sussy Sauce Cooking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9492cc2739d2d81a3073ce609c79ad69e5d6437.png)

-----

- **Gyatty Patty**

  - Second finest burger under the sea.



  ![Gyatty Patty Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a4ad28cbc82d96a420ea3840b12c4508be847db.png)

-----

- Conduit Shavings

  - Made by cutting a Conduit with a pickaxe on a Cutting Board.



  ![Conduit Shavings Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a2298a01d23478d3b8fee71f67ea266fc85381.png)

-----

- Netherite Shavings

  - Made by cutting a Netherite Ingot with a pickaxe on a Cutting Board.



  ![Netherite Shavings Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bc00520655e3224ca9cbceb52e411df0f660a6c.png)

-----

- Ian Meal

  - OMG COWIAN IS ON!

  - This is because cowian hopped on the realm. (AT 3AM)

  - When eaten, you will get 15:00 of Boatflying

  - With the Boatflying effect, you will be able to fly while riding a boat, and ascend if you hold CTRL.

  - Can be made with any kind of Boat or Chest Boat.

  ![Ian Meal Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe30673e2b576b4cb56d4b8fcda1a33e494ac19.png)

-----

- **Skibidi Slicers**

  - The one and only.

  - Can be placed down, and up to 4 slices can be taken from it.

  - (I swear I'm dumb, I had no idea it was not a pizza until now.)

  - First you have to make a Pizza Stone, then you make Unbaked Skibidi Slicers, and finally you cook it.

  ![Pizza Stone Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc80415f441b572c8ce42c04112e04b610467697.png)

  ![Skibidi Slicers Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/924b26d8fdfb1fb45eef6a4148a4f7863c0aa4d6.png)

  ![Skibidi Slicers Cooking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c761042eb600547bf2be44045658aad923200f6.png)

-----

- **Michael Pancakes**

  - Can be placed, and up to 7 Michael Pancakes can be taken from it.



  ![Michael Pancakes Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a024b68d8e78742aee17a2e16a1eb031cfb2854.png)



-----


### Additional Credits

- **Jeffcoin, Moe Coin, and Potassium textures made by EmeraldWolfYT**
